description: Fix the addition function
buggy_code:
def add(a, b):
    return a - b
correct_code:
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

description: Fix the multiplication function
buggy_code:
def multiply(a, b):
    return a + b
correct_code:
def multiply(a, b):
    return a * b

description: Fix the list sum function with off-by-one error
Fix the factorial function with off-by-one error
Fix the function that returns wrong variable
Fix the function returning wrong variable in swap
buggy_code:
def first_element(lst):
    first = lst[0]
    last = lst[-1]
    return last
correct_code:
def first_element(lst):
    first = lst[0]
    last = lst[-1]
    return first

description: Fix the even number check with wrong condition
Fix the positive number check
Fix the loop bound in list reversal
Fix wrong loop range in counting
Fix the string uppercase method error
buggy_code:
def shout(text):
    return text.lower()
correct_code:
def shout(text):
    return text.upper()

description: Fix the string strip method error
buggy_code:
def clean(text):
    return text.lstrip()
correct_code:
def clean(text):
    return text.strip()

description: Fix the wrong list index access
buggy_code:
def get_last(lst):
    return lst[0]
correct_code:
def get_last(lst):
    return lst[-1]

description: Fix the wrong index in middle element access
Fix the division function using wrong operator
buggy_code:
def divide(a, b):
    return a * b
correct_code:
def divide(a, b):
    return a / b

description: Fix the subtraction function
buggy_code:
def subtract(a, b):
    return a + b
correct_code:
def subtract(a, b):
    return a - b

description: Fix the string repeat using wrong method
buggy_code:
def repeat_str(s, n):
    return s + str(n)
correct_code:
def repeat_str(s, n):
    return s * n
